com.mentor.chs.api

Interface IXBlockPin

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXAbstractPin, IXConnectivityObject, IXObject, IXPin<IXAbstractPinList>, IXWriteableObject

    public interface IXBlockPin
extends IXAbstractPin
    Interface for accessing the associated pin of a pin on a block.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXAbstractPin getAssociatedPin(java.util.Collection<? extends IXDesign> designsInscope)
      This method will return the pin associated to the block pin.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXAbstractPin

    • Method Detail

      • getAssociatedPin

        IXAbstractPin getAssociatedPin(java.util.Collection<? extends IXDesign> designsInscope)

        This method will return the pin associated to the block pin. A block is associated with a design revision tree. A pin on this block can be associated to a pin whose design container is in this design revision. A particular revision of the design is required to get the associated pin of a block pin. The scope of designs is used in selection of a particular design from the associated revision tree of a block(owner).

        Example:

        The following example finds the pins associated to pins of block in a build list. The result of this function will differ when queried for the same block on a build list with different set of designs. 
         Map<@link IXBlockPin, @link IXAbstractPin> getMapofBlockPinAndAssociatedPin(IXBuildList buildList,
 IXBlock block) {
                Collection<IXDesign> designsInScope = new ArrayList<IXDesign>();
                designsInScope.addAll(buildList.getDesigns());
                Map<IXBlockPin,IXAbstractPin> associatedPinOfBlockPin = new HashMap<IXBlockPin, IXAbstractPin>();
                for(IXAbstractPin pin: block.getPins()) {
                        associatedPinOfBlockPin.put((IXBlockPin)pin, (IXBlockPin)pin).getAssociatedPin(designsInScope));
         }
     return associatedPinOfBlockPin;
 }
        Parameters:
        designsInscope - This is scope of designs used to get the design associated to the block. The associated pin is chosen from this design. If null will allow the selection of design from active build list or the latest revision of the associated design.
        Returns:
        The pin from the design revision currently associated from the list of designs passed as arguments. This will be null if block is not associated to any of the designs passed as scope.
